linapro-demo-source.description: Source plugin sample with hosted pages and public/protected route examples.
linapro-demo-source.name: Source Plugin Demo

messages.attachmentHint: Attachments are stored together with the source-plugin demo record. If plugin storage is purged during uninstall, the attached file is removed as well.
messages.removeAttachment: Remove the current attachment on submit
messages.uploadHint: Skip upload to keep the current attachment. Uploading a new file replaces the existing attachment automatically.
messages.uploadText: Click or drag a file here to upload a single attachment

page.summaryMessage: This short description comes from the linapro-demo-source API and verifies that a source plugin menu page can read backend data.

uninstall_blocked.demo_records_exist: Demo records exist for one or more tenants. Delete demo records before uninstalling.
